this_title: If Footmen Tire You, What Will Horses Do?
trans_title: 如果侍者抓住了你，马儿们会怎么做
introduction: Based on the preachings of Reverend Estus W. Pirkle, this film warns what will happen to America if the citizens do not give up their depraved ways and turn to God and Jesus for salvation. Communist infiltrators, the "footmen", will pave the way for an all out invasion by weakening our will through TV, dance, rock music and alcohol. Once the invasion begins, the new Communist government will proceed to round up all Christians, and either execute them or force them to undergo re-education. Only by putting their faith in the bible where it belongs, says Rev. Pirkle, can America resist the coming Red Menace.
chinese_title: 如果侍者抓住了你，马儿们会怎么做
foreign_title: If Footmen Tire You, What Will Horses Do?
